zh.Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Belgium: 比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ida de Chiny於大約1078年出生在法國洛萊姆斯布拉班吉素-斯時，她的父親Otton II de Chiny14歲，母親Adélaïs de Namur13歲。她於1105年與Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她於1105年被列為countess of leuven。她去世於1125年3月28日在比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ida de Chiny于大约1078年出生在法国洛萊姆斯布拉班吉素-斯时，她的父亲Otton II de Chiny14岁，母亲Adélaïs de Namur13岁。她于1105年与Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她于1105年被列为countess of leuven。她去世于1125年3月28日在比利时福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chiny
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Old English cin ‘chin’, as a nickname for someone with a prominent chin or else for a clean-shaven man.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 陳 (see   Chen   1) and 錢 (see   Qian   1).

variants.name: Chin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wing, Wai, Hong, Fook, Chun, Lun, Ying, Young, Yuk, Kin, Leung, Mee.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surnames 金, 靳 and 晉, see   Jin   1-3.

variants.name: Ching
meanings: Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surnames 荊, 景, 井, 敬, 靖 and 經, see   Jing   1-6.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 程, see   Cheng   1.

variants.name: Chen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Wei, Jian, Ming, Hong, Li, Yan, Wen, Jing, Ping, Ying, Feng, Mei.

Mandarin form of the surname 陳, meaning ‘to explain’ and ‘old’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from Chen (陳), the name of a state (located mainly in present-day Henan and Anhui provinces) granted to Hu Gong Man (Duke Hu of Chen, reigned 1045–986  BC ). His descendants acquired 陳, the name of the state, as their surname. (ii) from the surname Hou Mo Chen (侯莫陳), borne by people from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. They adopted the surname 陳 after they moved to Luoyang (in present-day Henan province) during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Ida
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Norman name, of Germanic origin, derived from īd ‘work’. This died out during the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, influenced by its use in Tennyson's The Princess ( 1847 ) for the central character, who devotes herself to the cause of women's rights and women's education in a thoroughly Victorian way. The name is also associated with Mount Ida in Crete, which was connected in classical times with the worship of Zeus, king of the gods, who was supposed to have been brought up in a cave on the mountainside. In the 1930s it became famous as the name of the film star Ida Lupino ( 1914–1995 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Ida de Chiny was born about 1078, in Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, France, her father, Otton II de Chiny, was 14 and her mother, Adélaïs de Namur, was 13. She married Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen in 1105. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. In 1105, at the age of 28, her occupation is listed as countess of leuven. She died on 28 March 1125, in Leuven, Flemish Brabant, Belgium, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ida de Chiny est née environ 1078, à Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Otton II de Chiny, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Adélaïs de Namur, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen en 1105. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. En 1105, à l’âge de 28 ans, la profession de sa indiquée est countess of leuven. Elle est décédée le 28 mars 1125, à Leuven, Brabant Flamand, Belgique, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ida de Chiny um 1078 in Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Otton II de Chiny 14 und ihre Mutter Adélaïs de Namur 13. Sie hat 1105 Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1105, als sie 28 Jahre alt war, war ihr Beruf als countess of leuven aufgeführt. Sie starb am 28. März 1125 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Leuven, Flämisch Brabant, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ida de Chiny è nata il circa 1078 nel Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, sua padre, Otton II de Chiny, aveva 14 anni e sua madre, Adélaïs de Namur, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen nel 1105. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1105, all'età di 28 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come countess of leuven. Morì il 28 marzo 1125, nel Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Belgio, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ida de Chinyが約1078年にフランスロレィヌメウゼブラバント-スル-メウゼで生まれた時，父Otton II de Chinyは14歳，母Adélaïs de Namurは13歳であった。1105年にGodfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1105年，28歳の時，職業はcountess of leuvenと記録されている。彼女は1125年3月28日にベルギーvラアムス-ブラバントレウベンで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ida de Chiny(이)가 대략 1078년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 브라반트-수-우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otton II de Chiny(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adélaïs de Namur(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1105년 Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1105년, 28세의 나이로 그녀의 직업은 countess of leuven이었다. 그녀는 1125년 3월 28일 벨기에 블라아스-브라반트 레우븐에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ida de Chiny nasceu aproximadamente 1078, em Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Otton II de Chiny, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Adélaïs de Namur, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen em 1105. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1105, com 28 anos, sua profissão aparece como countess of leuven. Ela faleceu em 28 de março de 1125, em Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ida de Chiny родилась около 1078 г. в местности брабант-сур-меус, меус, лорреаин, Франция, её отцу по имени Otton II de Chiny было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Adélaïs de Namur, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen в 1105 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. В 1105 году, в возрасте 28 лет,  она работала по профессии countess of leuven. Она умерла 28 марта 1125 г. в местности леувен, влаамс-брабант, Бельгия в возрасте 48 лет.

sm.from 1095 to 1125: mai le 1095 e o'o I le 1125

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ida de Chiny nació aproximadamente 1078, en Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Otton II de Chiny, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Adélaïs de Namur, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen en 1105. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1105, a la edad de 28 años, su ocupación registrada era countess of leuven. Murió el 28 de marzo de 1125, en Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, a la edad de 48 años.
